name: topsec-fw-v3-7-6
description: OctoBus package for TopSec FW V3.7.6 REST login, blacklist, and logout workflows.

TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/Login.name: login
TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/Login.description: Log in to the TopSec FW V3.7.6 WebUI.

TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/AddBlackli.name: add-blacklist-ip
TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/AddBlackli.description: Add one or more IP addresses to the TopSec FW V3.7.6 blacklist.

TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/DeleteBlac.name: delete-blacklist-ip
TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/DeleteBlac.description: Remove one or more IP addresses from the TopSec FW V3.7.6 blacklist.

TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/Logout.name: logout
TopSec_FW_V376.TopSec_FW_V376/Logout.description: Log out from the TopSec FW V3.7.6 WebUI.
